texto: Tomorrow will never call to ask your opinion
autor: you don't control it. Stop allowing today's possibilities to be robbed by tomorrow's insecurities.

Stop allowing today's possibilities to be robbed by tomorrow's insecurities. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Tomorrow will never call to ask your opinion” articula reflexao, steve-maraboli, tomorrow em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
